title: Dou kyu sei – Classmates
posterAlt: Dou kyu sei – Classmates (2016) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Rihito Sajo, an honor student with a perfect score on the entrance exam and Hikaru Kusakabe, in a band and popular among girls, would have never crossed paths. Until one day they started talking at the practice for their school’s upcoming chorus festival. After school, the two meet regularly, as Hikaru helps Rihito to improve his singing skills. While they listen to each other’s voice and harmonize, their hearts start to beat together.
synopsis: Released in 2016, Dou kyu sei – Classmates is a romance and animation film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
